entry.title: New: CR 25-34 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 158, CD1 (2024), to authorize the Mayor to execute an intergovernmental agreement for the Department of Police to help the County of Kaua‘i with forensic drug testing.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
